content: 0.2.1 fixes two upstream issues that prevented the Phase-2 approve flow from closing under claude -p: (1) grill_me prompt now prescribes the 9 parser-aligned section headings AND requires a top-level # Understanding Report marker; (2) Stop hook prefers payload.last_assistant_message over the race-y transcript-file read. End-to-end smoke confirmed: approve -> Edit succeeds, revoke -> Edit blocks, audit log captures all events.

Template fix is structurally sound: parseReport accepts the rendered template body for both FULL_PROMPT and GRILL_ME_PROMPT (roundtrip tests). Live agent under the new template emits exactly the prescribed sections plus the # Understanding Report top heading; the dogfood transcript shows 9 ### headings and the marker.
source: tests/prompts.test.ts roundtrip + live agent transcript inspection

content: last_assistant_message preference is opt-in (only used when the field is non-empty) and falls back to extractLastAssistantText for older harnesses — backwards compatible. Two new binary tests pin both paths.
